title: 茂木外相 きょうからトルコ訪問 NATO関連行事など出席へ
snippet: 外務省は茂木外務大臣が6日からトルコを訪問すると発表しました。NATO＝北大西洋条約機構のルッテ事務総長との会合に高市総理大臣の代理として出席するほか、日米韓3か国の外相会談などが行われる見通しです。

snippet: The agency says that they "appear to be pressure vessels from a space launch vehicle".

title: Thousands of forgotten WW1 soldiers recognised for first time
snippet: Nearly 10,000 soldiers' names are being added to the official database of war dead, a cherished step for many of their descendants.

title: From 'a beautiful night' to 'world's greatest hangover', guests react to Taylor and Travis's wedding
snippet: Some of the famous guests have been posting on social media about the big day in New York.
